name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_ramc_uvw_inspection
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_ramc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_inspection' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`startreferencepointname` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startdate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`startreferencepointname` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startdate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'startreferencepointname|startdistancepast|createddate|scheduleddate|startdate|completeddate|completeduser' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_ramc`.`uvw_inspection`
